description: Document and asset generation engine. Includes document_digest, pptx_slide_text, and pptx_filter_slides for template-inheriting partial-update workflows.

invocation_contexts.note: This actuator has two op namespaces. Choose based on where the step is written.

from_top_level_pipeline.note: The runner splits domain:action, loads media-actuator, and wraps the step in a single-step sub-pipeline.

from_media_actuator_examples_or_nested_s.note: Used inside media-actuator/examples/ or steps passed directly to executePipeline. No domain prefix needed.

capture.note: Extract slide text from a PPTX file into context. Set params.ocr=true or params.ocr.enabled=true to OCR slide images through the local OCR router.
Extract full PPTX design protocol (slides + master theme + raw passthrough) into context. Set params.ocr=true or params.ocr.enabled=true to attach OCR results for slide images.
Extract full XLSX design protocol (sheets + styles + raw passthrough) into context.
Read a JSON file into context.

transform.note: Select slide indices by owner labels from pptx_slide_text output.
Compare two extracted slide sets and report added, removed, changed, and unchanged slides.
Set a key in the pipeline context. Use to inject theme, content arrays, or config before merge_content.
Load a named theme from knowledge/public/design-patterns/media-templates/themes.json into active_theme.
Load a design pattern JSON into active_pattern.
Combine active_theme + active_pattern + content_data into last_pptx_design (or last_xlsx_design, etc.).
Derive a reusable theme from an extracted PPTX design (for master-theme reuse across decks).
Generate a narrative outline from a proposal brief.
Expand a storyline into per-slide content_data ready for merge_content.
Compile a canonical media brief into a render-ready design protocol.
Validate compiled PPTX layout diagnostics before any render; overflow requires explicit review-only opt-in.

MP-04: rasterize a rendered artifact and inspect it against the visual-review rubric. Reports only — a review that cannot run (missing rasterizer, denied egress, no vision channel) returns status=skipped with a reason and is never a pass.
Block delivery unless visual review completed with no outstanding errors.

MP-05: fix the media brief before production and record which decisions were stated by the operator versus inferred here. Carries the run-shape (review rounds, degraded-fallback and external-egress permissions) that downstream steps obey.

apply.note: Register a validated presentation preference profile in the media/design policy registry.
Render last_pptx_design to a .pptx file. Supports text, shape, image (imagePath or imageData), table, line, and smartart elements.
Write a subset of slides from an existing PPTX by index.
Text-replacement patch on an existing PPTX (simple find-replace).
Write a context value to a file path.
